issues.description: Missing first effect entirely. Card text states '[Your Turn] If you have 4 or more Life cards, give this Leader −1000 power.' This requires a StartOfTurn trigger with condition HasLife (4+) and PowerBoost action of -1000. Currently only OnAttack effect is present.

OnAttack effect missing cost condition. Card text specifies 'DON!! −1' as a cost (optional activation with 'You may'). This should be represented as a condition or cost modifier, not just a bare power boost.
